description: Leading large-scale data analysis and reporting initiatives across Housing & Residential Life. Building ETL pipelines, developing Tableau dashboards, and applying statistical and predictive modeling on datasets exceeding 250,000 records to improve student outcomes and operational efficiency.

Developed Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems using LLMs, FAISS, and Python. Built end-to-end NLP pipelines for knowledge extraction, semantic search, and question-answering, contributing to scalable AI applications and research publications.

Analyzed multi-source healthcare datasets and built Power BI and Tableau dashboards covering mental health, AOD, and utilization metrics. Developed automated ETL workflows and data validation frameworks, reducing reporting errors by 40% and improving decision-making.

Built analytics infrastructure from the ground up, including SQL pipelines, KPI tracking systems, and dashboards. Performed user behavior analysis and delivered data-driven insights that improved product performance and operational efficiency.
